name: 12L Gradient-Guided Quant + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + EMA + XSA
blurb: 12 layers funded by gradient-guided adaptive quantization (int5/int6/int7 per-tensor based on gradient sensitivity). Partial RoPE (16/64 dims), LN Scale (1/sqrt(layer+1)), XSA on last 4 layers, EMA (0.997). Key finding: gradient-guided quant allocates precision where it matters, enabling 12 layers in 15.6 MB. Late QAT is counterproductive at 12L because the training time cost exceeds the quant improvement.
author: samuellarson
